title: jurinea bellidioides
intro: Jurinea bellidioides, also known as common fleabane or wormwood fleabane, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jurinea bellidioides include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
